## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Jason and Edin to discuss website updates, design changes, and upcoming priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/11c5v1Vd3xd6B-BxNiSgqKDXCiJC1KjT?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Blog redesign progressing well; final tweaks needed for responsiveness, styling, and UX](https://fathom.video/share/11c5v1Vd3xd6B-BxNiSgqKDXCiJC1KjT?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [6 people have already paid $50 for annual Lead Growth Community membership](https://fathom.video/share/11c5v1Vd3xd6B-BxNiSgqKDXCiJC1KjT?tab=summary&timestamp=1491.0)
  - [Post-blog redesign priorities: improve Lead Growth Community offerings and update website](https://fathom.video/share/11c5v1Vd3xd6B-BxNiSgqKDXCiJC1KjT?tab=summary&timestamp=1486.0)

## Topics

### Blog Redesign Progress

  - [Responsive design challenges with tables and tab components](https://fathom.video/share/11c5v1Vd3xd6B-BxNiSgqKDXCiJC1KjT?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
  - [Table styling: wider on mobile, bleeding outside container on desktop](https://fathom.video/share/11c5v1Vd3xd6B-BxNiSgqKDXCiJC1KjT?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [Tab component styling needs refinement for better visibility](https://fathom.video/share/11c5v1Vd3xd6B-BxNiSgqKDXCiJC1KjT?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
  - [Considering author section at top, similar to OpenAI's layout](https://fathom.video/share/11c5v1Vd3xd6B-BxNiSgqKDXCiJC1KjT?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)
  - [Table of contents placement options discussed (top of post vs. collapsible sidebar)](https://fathom.video/share/11c5v1Vd3xd6B-BxNiSgqKDXCiJC1KjT?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)
  - [Font size considerations: slightly smaller for academic feel, but larger for readability](https://fathom.video/share/11c5v1Vd3xd6B-BxNiSgqKDXCiJC1KjT?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)
  - [Inspiration from Anthropic's research site for custom components and layout](https://fathom.video/share/11c5v1Vd3xd6B-BxNiSgqKDXCiJC1KjT?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)

### UX Improvements

  - [New "prompt wrapper" component with fixed height and scrolling](https://fathom.video/share/11c5v1Vd3xd6B-BxNiSgqKDXCiJC1KjT?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [Citations styled as basic small text rather than in gray boxes](https://fathom.video/share/11c5v1Vd3xd6B-BxNiSgqKDXCiJC1KjT?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [Exploring floating, hideable table of contents for long posts](https://fathom.video/share/11c5v1Vd3xd6B-BxNiSgqKDXCiJC1KjT?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
  - [Creating reusable components for consistent styling (e.g., callouts, author sections)](https://fathom.video/share/11c5v1Vd3xd6B-BxNiSgqKDXCiJC1KjT?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)

### Technical Considerations

  - [Investigating CMS options supporting MDX for rich content creation](https://fathom.video/share/11c5v1Vd3xd6B-BxNiSgqKDXCiJC1KjT?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
  - [Implementing programmatic table of contents generation](https://fathom.video/share/11c5v1Vd3xd6B-BxNiSgqKDXCiJC1KjT?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)
  - [Reviewing script placement (tag manager vs. separate scripts)](https://fathom.video/share/11c5v1Vd3xd6B-BxNiSgqKDXCiJC1KjT?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

### Lead Growth Community

  - [6 people paid $200/year (discounted to $50) without full feature set](https://fathom.video/share/11c5v1Vd3xd6B-BxNiSgqKDXCiJC1KjT?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
  - [Current offering limited to workshop content broken into a course](https://fathom.video/share/11c5v1Vd3xd6B-BxNiSgqKDXCiJC1KjT?tab=summary&timestamp=1532.0)
  - [Need to expand community features and align website with actual offerings](https://fathom.video/share/11c5v1Vd3xd6B-BxNiSgqKDXCiJC1KjT?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Address responsiveness issues (tables, tab components)](https://fathom.video/share/11c5v1Vd3xd6B-BxNiSgqKDXCiJC1KjT?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
  - [Refine styling for better UX (tab visibility, floating table of contents)](https://fathom.video/share/11c5v1Vd3xd6B-BxNiSgqKDXCiJC1KjT?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
  - [Create reusable components for consistent design (callouts, author sections)](https://fathom.video/share/11c5v1Vd3xd6B-BxNiSgqKDXCiJC1KjT?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [Review and merge website update PR](https://fathom.video/share/11c5v1Vd3xd6B-BxNiSgqKDXCiJC1KjT?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Prioritize Lead Growth Community improvements after blog redesign](https://fathom.video/share/11c5v1Vd3xd6B-BxNiSgqKDXCiJC1KjT?tab=summary&timestamp=1486.0)
  - [Await Nick's review before deploying blog changes](https://fathom.video/share/11c5v1Vd3xd6B-BxNiSgqKDXCiJC1KjT?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
  - [Sync tomorrow to discuss post-blog redesign priorities](https://fathom.video/share/11c5v1Vd3xd6B-BxNiSgqKDXCiJC1KjT?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
